# Third-Party Asset Credits

This project uses placeholder assets from the following third-party sources.

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/modular-dungeon-kit

- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/animal-pack
- License: Creative Commons CC0

## OpenGameArt

## License Note

Third-party assets remain under their original licenses. The proprietary project license applies only to the original Cave Bosses: Dragon Trappers project code, design, documentation, and game-specific content.
